name: sentinel-live-target
description: Disposable Sentinel breaking-change acceptance target. A deliberately-outdated dep (@sentinel-fixture/break@0.1.0, default export) whose 0.2.0 removes the default in favor of a named export. The gate is a real hermetic check (vendored-tarball extract + import + assert) that FAILS unless the source import is adapted default -> named. Proves Sentinel's Patcher edits SOURCE to adapt to a breaking bump (not a no-code Dependabot bump).
